user_feedback: can you give me 3 lives, and can you make the needed coins a bit higher to progress hrough eahc stage, and when a level is compelte, I want there to be a level compelte screen and to automatically progress to a different map (perhaps you can change the color of the background a bit or change the scenery) across the 9 levels
analysis:
- Issue identified: Need to implement 3 lives system, increase coin requirements for level progression, add level complete screen with auto-progression, and create visual variety across 9 levels with different backgrounds/scenery
- Files affected: globals.js, game.js, ui.js, physics.js, input.js, entities.js, lighting.js
- Changes needed: 
  1. Add lives tracking (3 lives) to gameState with invincibility after hit
  2. Approximately double coin requirements for each level
  3. Add LEVEL_COMPLETE phase with auto-progression after 3 seconds
  4. Implement visual theme changes per level (background colors, fog, tunnel colors, lighting)
  5. Update collision to subtract lives instead of instant death
  6. Add level complete UI screen
  7. Update displays to show lives count
